message:
test(diff_strategy): add 40 edge-case tests for Bayesian diff selector (bd-2d279)

Cover DiffStrategy Display/Debug/Clone/Eq, StrategyEvidence Display/
Clone/Debug, DiffStrategyConfig all fields/clone/debug, selector
construction (default vs with_defaults), config accessor, frame_count
tracking, override_last_strategy (with/without evidence),
select_with_scan_estimate (custom cells, clamping), ChangeRateEstimator
reset/clone/debug/min_observation_cells/changed-exceeds-scanned/
variance-decreases/upper_quantile-at-50pct/upper_quantile-monotonic,
normalization helpers (normalize_positive/cost/decay/ratio),
cost_for_strategy helper, small buffers (1x1, 0-width, 0-height),
all-dirty vs no-dirty evidence, no-decay mode, evidence costs finite,
evidence posterior matches selector, selector clone/debug, hysteresis
first-select, and conservative mode higher-p estimates.

64 total tests (24 existing + 40 new).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
